headline: Oil Steady on Signs US, Iran Working Toward Ceasefire Extension
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Oil steadied on signs the US and Iran may extend a ceasefire and restart talks to end the war that’s rocked energy markets.Brent was stable below $95 a barrel after ending Wednesday barely changed, while West Texas Intermediate was near $91. Washington and Tehran are considering a two-week ceasefire extension to allow more time to negotiate a peace deal, according to a person familiar with the matter.In the Strait of Hormuz — which connects the Persian Gulf to global markets — mov
